title: Subqueries
description: Nesting one query inside another: scalar subqueries and the single-value rule, IN subqueries, the notorious NOT IN NULL trap and its fixes, correlated subqueries, EXISTS/NOT EXISTS as the safe anti-join, derived tables, and choosing between a subquery and a join.

lessons.title: IN Subquery: Who Manages a Branch
NOT IN and the NULL Trap
NOT EXISTS: Branches With No Employees
